hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; out=""; case "$f" in *.qml) result=$(/usr/lib/qt6/bin/qmllint "$f" 2>&1) || out="$result" ;; *.py|*/ai-usage-json) result=$(python3 -m py_compile "$f" 2>&1) || out="$result" ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; [ -n "$out" ] && jq -n --arg o "$out" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("Lint failed for edited file:\n"+$o)}}'; exit 0; }
